demo.notice: A fictional artist demonstrates the platform with redistribution-safe material.

identity.name: Daymark Assembly
identity.statement: Music made for attentive rooms and bodies in motion.
identity.biography: Daymark Assembly is a fictional artist created to demonstrate an artist-owned platform. Its catalog, writing, artwork, and audio are original demonstration material and can be replaced through the guided setup process.

contact.bookingNote: Use the contact page for collaborations, teaching, and licensing questions.

typography.displayFamily: Iowan Old Style, Baskerville, Georgia, serif
typography.bodyFamily: Inter, Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif

seo.title: Daymark Assembly
seo.description: Original fictional music, learning, and licensing from an artist-owned demonstration.

footer.statement: Music made for attentive rooms and bodies in motion.

homepage.kicker: A direct home for independent work
homepage.introduction: Listen, learn, license music, and support the work in the same place. This installation belongs to the artist who operates it.

release.title: Lines We Carry
release.description: A fictional release about repetition, weight, and the small decisions that turn a phrase toward home.

principles.label: Listen here
principles.text: The catalog is organized by the artist, with context that stays beside the music.

principles.label: Learn directly
principles.text: Lessons can join music, writing, video, and progress without sending students elsewhere.

principles.label: Keep the relationship
principles.text: Purchases, memberships, and licenses resolve through one understandable access system.
